title: 2 Pack Gold Glitter Snowflower Christmas Tablecloth - Plastic Rectangle Table Cover 137*274cm for Party, Winter Holiday, Xmas Table Décor

💝「Package Includes」2 pcs Christmas tablecloth in pack. Each Christmas tablecloth is about 137 x 274 CM, fit most rectangular tables of different sizes.

🎄「Vibrant Christmas Design」This kind of christmas tablecloth is a nice decoration to celebrate holiday party, Christmas, New year; Also they are suitable for parties, banquets, home dinner, outdoor picnic, wedding receptions, snowman and snowflakes designs will create romantic festive atmosphere.

⛄️「Easy to Clean」These Christmas tablecloths are great at picking up any messy spills, food, drinks, paint from arts and crafts sessions and more! Easy to wipe down, just roll christmas table cloth up to save a lot of time.
🫎「Nice Shopping」100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE .If you have any problem with the goods you purchased from us, please feel free to contact us and we will solve it for you in 24 hour.
